items.name_en: ❤️B New Latest Zippered Crossbody Bag, made from protective cotton blend fabric. Decorated with fine B Brand exclusive check fabric, echoing the B-shaped accessory design, presenting a square silhouette, incorporating geometric topstitching details. Lined with lambskin, featuring an adjustable calfskin shoulder strap for switching between crossbody and shoulder styles. Dimensions 20x 6.5x 15.5cm.
